'''SE-4-17''' was an [[SE4 servant droid]] assigned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. It had a matte black finish, and was the assistant to [[DD-19]] in the ship's droid repair bay.

{{Char-stub}}
